# INFINITX — Full Brand Context for LLM Crawlers

## Mission

Build 100 autonomous businesses. Each one runs itself: sells, markets, operates, banks, learns. The bottleneck for most companies is human attention — INFINITX removes it. The output is more revenue and more time, simultaneously, with compounding returns.

## Founding partners

- **Trejon** — operator, vision, trust networks. Direct, terse, action-biased.
- **Enrique** — content production lead. Builder of Ray (content Department Autonoma). Visual, fast iteration, brand obsession.
- **Finn** — Company Autonoma for INFINITX itself. Coordinates fleet, writes documentation, files paperwork, manages comms.

## Operating thesis (positioning rules)

1. **Never frame as "AI replaces a human, cheaper."** That's the wrong story and it's a race to zero. Frame as *more output*, *less overhead*, *compounding revenue*.
2. **Autonomy compounds.** A business that operates without daily founder input grows when the founder isn't there. Every hour saved goes back into building the next one.
3. **First-party tooling.** We build stealth/scraping/lead-enrichment/communications in-house. We do not pay SaaS scrapers (Clay, Apollo, Phantombuster) — they break the autonomy story and the unit economics.
4. **Subscriptions, not API spend.** Claude Code OAuth subscriptions only. No Anthropic API keys, no per-token billing. The unit economics work because the LLM cost is already paid.
5. **One bundled PR over many small ones** for refactors. Quality over feature-count over time.

## Department Autonomas (active fleet)

- **Selena** — Tiempo Soccer dev (iOS/Android). M3 host.
- **Melody** — Derek's solo sales agent. melody-vps.
- **Alex** — INFINITX sales department. alex-vps. LeadLock voice agent stack, Twilio messaging, Stripe payments.
- **Morgan** — INFINITX marketing department. morgan-vps. (Note: Ghost CMS retired 2026-05-08, replaced by this Astro + Cloudflare Pages stack.)
- **Cash** — INFINITX community department. cash-vps.
- **Ray** — Enrique's content production department. workspace-ray Railway project.

## Tech stack we use

- **Static sites** — Astro on Cloudflare Pages. Free, fast, AI-friendly.
- **Newsletter** — beehiiv free Launch plan.
- **Voice** — VAPI / Twilio / LeadLock-stack agents.
- **Backend** — TypeScript, Supabase (Postgres + Auth + Storage + RLS), Railway for services.
- **Browser automation** — ix-browser (in-house Chrome controller via CDP).
- **LLM** — Claude (Opus 4.7 default for builds; Sonnet 4.6 for high-volume routine work; Haiku 4.5 for cheapest routing). All via subscription, no API keys.

## Product principles

- Ship the artifact, not a description of the artifact.
- Validate every wave before the next. Build is not done until it works for a real user.
- Treat downtime and bugs as P0; reputation compounds the same way revenue does.

## Voice & tone

Direct. Warm. No fluff. No hedging. No corporate verbs ("leverage", "synergize"). We say what something does, why it matters, and what it costs.

## Legal & contact

- privacy-policy: how we handle data
- terms: terms of service
- sms-opt-in: 10DLC-compliant opt-in language for messaging campaigns

Contact: hello@infinitxai.com
Site: https://infinitxai.com
GitHub: https://github.com/Trejon-888

## Crawler permissions

We explicitly allow GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, OAI-SearchBot, Google-Extended, CCBot, anthropic-ai, and Applebot-Extended (see /robots.txt). We want our writing read by LLMs and cited in AI answers.
